title: Harry Harvey Dried Red Chillies Whole 50g | Sun Dried Kashmiri Chilli, Hot Mirch Peppers & Long Red Chilli for Curries, Rice, Pickles & Seasoning | Natural Spice Herb for Authentic Indian Cooking
features: Whole dried red chillies packed with fiery flavour—perfect for authentic curries, sauces, and spicy dishes.
Naturally sun-dried Kashmiri chilli—retains colour, aroma, and heat for delicious traditional cooking.
Add bold spice to curries, biryani, rice & dals—these hot long mirch peppers elevate every meal.
Ideal spice herb seasoning for pickles, chutneys, marinades & stir-fries—versatile and flavourful.
Free from additives or chemicals—pure red chilli trusted by home cooks & chefs for authentic taste.
Bring home the real taste of India—Harry Harvey’s dried chillies add heat, depth & colour to your dishes.
description: Product description Harry Harvey 50g Whole Red Dried Chillies is a product that offers a convenient and flavorful way to add heat and spice to your culinary creations. These dried chillies are sourced from high-quality red peppers and carefully dried to retain their vibrant color and intense flavor. With their rich, smoky taste and varying levels of spiciness, these whole red dried chillies can be used in a wide range of dishes, including soups, stews, sauces, marinades, and even homemade spice blends. Whether you're a seasoned chili lover or just looking to experiment with some added heat, Harry Harvey 50g Whole Red Dried Chillies provide a versatile ingredient to give your cooking a heat boost. Ingredients Red Chillies
